title: RemoveSkillMethod
description: Contract for remove.skill JSON-RPC method. Removes one current symlink install from a project provider; runs asynchronously and reports progress via operation.progress notifications.

projectId.description: ID of the project the install belongs to

installId.description: ID of the installed-skill row to remove (from project.get entries)

RemoveSkillResponse.title: RemoveSkillResponse
RemoveSkillResponse.description: Immediate response — the removal runs asynchronously. Errors: validation_error (1001) project/install not found or not removable; conflict_error (1005) project busy or entry changed on disk; filesystem_error (1002) unlink failed.

operationId.description: ID of the created remove operation; use with operation.progress notifications and operation.cancel
